name: Major/Remnant Husk | The Interviewed
description:
"They are not people. They are CREATURE. Isn't that clear for you?"

Yes! I finally got around to requests! Of course, I don’t have that many of them, but still, it’s time to do them! Maybe I didn't notice all the requests, and maybe I should create a bot... I don't know. But, I do have a Tumblr account:"creaturenikto" or "Shrimp🦐". So, if you want, you can find me there (I have an avatar with a plush Bonnie). Maybe I should take requests there instead of here? At least that way I'll definitely not forget them. Oh, and the character description might not be accurate, so please forgive me. Enjoy!
creator: creaturenikto
